items.title: England World Cup hero Djed Spence ‘truly wants to leave Tottenham for shock foreign transfer’
items.summary: DJED SPENCE wants to leave Tottenham for Inter Milan, according to reports in Italy. The England full-back impressed at the World Cup as the Three Lions achieved a podium finish. items.title: Freestyle football world champion Lia Lewis gets engaged at dreamy Kandima in the Maldives
items.summary: ENGLAND'S freestyle football world champion, Lia Lewis, has got engaged while on holiday in the Maldives. items.title: How the World Cup has affected your Premier League team
items.summary: Once the trophy is lifted by either Spain or Argentina in New Jersey on Sunday night, attention will shift from the 2026 World Cup to the upcoming domestic season.

items.title: Xabi Alonso ‘deems Chelsea star untouchable amid major transfer interest from rival’ despite £117m Morgan Rogers arrival
items.summary: CHELSEA star Joao Pedro is reportedly untouchable and will therefore NOT join Barcelona. The Brazilian was sounded out to be a potential replacement for Robert Lewandowski in Catalonia but Chelsea chiefs are understood to have closed the door on any deal. items.title: England stars land back home after 10-hour flight following World Cup third-place thriller win over France
items.summary: ENGLAND stars have landed back home after their harrowing World Cup exit at the hands of Argentina. They lifted off from Miami on Saturday night and touched down in Birmingham after seven weeks on the road together.
